name: Amazoness Hot Spring
name_jp: アマゾネスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>秘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>湯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can take 1 "Amazoness" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or (if it is a Pendulum Monster) place it in your Pendulum Zone. When you take battle damage while you control an "Amazoness" Monster Card: You can gain LP equal to the damage you took. You can only use this effect of "Amazoness Hot Spring" once per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can take 1 "Amazoness" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or (if it is a Pendulum Monster) place it in your Pendulum Zone. When you take battle damage while you control an "Amazoness" Monster Card: You can gain LP equal to the damage you took. You can only use this effect of "Amazoness Hot Spring" once per turn.

action: Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
Activates if you take battle damage
